query: SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as sessions, SUM(creditsUsed) as total_credits FROM ai_sessions GROUP BY platform ORDER BY sessions DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3RYRgiKBksaJ9ku.eff254cfce12 --database 6PpfERRQXfuwb7GGi2gFrK --execute SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as sessions, SUM(creditsUsed) as total_credits FROM ai_sessions GROUP BY platform ORDER BY sessions DESC;
